deployment.auth: Better Auth (Google OAuth, GitHub OAuth, Magic Link via Resend)

infrastructure.rate_limiter: Durable Object with SQLite sliding window

notable_changes: Schema types: 27 → 51 (added teamMember, galleryImage, comparisonColumn/Row, timelineEntry objects + projectCards, teamGrid, imageGallery, articleList, comparisonTable, timeline, pullquote, divider, announcementBar, sponsorshipTiers blocks)
New document type: submission (read-only contact form data)
Pages: 9 → 20 routes (portal expansion: login, denied, sponsorSlug, events, student, auth, API endpoints)
New dependencies: better-auth, drizzle-orm, nanostores, @preact/signals, @schedule-x/*, resend, temporal-polyfill, lucide-static
Cloudflare bindings: Added D1 (PORTAL_DB), KV (SESSION_CACHE), DO (RATE_LIMITER)
Middleware: expanded from CF Access JWT to Better Auth + KV cache + DO rate limiting + sponsor escalation
Portal: full SSR portal with sponsor dashboard, events calendar, projects API
Auth: Better Auth with Google OAuth, GitHub OAuth, Magic Link (Resend)
Multi-workspace Studio: added rwc workspace with site-aware filtering
Docker: added RWC variant services (rwc-us:4322, rwc-intl:4323)
Test files: 48 → 94 (new block tests, portal tests, auth tests, calendar tests)
New CI workflow: sanity-deploy removed from list (may have been renamed)
Sanity: upgraded from v5.10 to v5.14

findings_summary.project_classification: Monorepo (npm workspaces + standalone), 4 parts, TypeScript/Python, v1.11.0
findings_summary.technology_stack: Astro 5.17 + Sanity 5.14 + Tailwind 4.1 + React 19.2 + Better Auth + Drizzle + Schedule-X + Storybook 10.2 + Vitest 3.2 + Playwright 1.58
findings_summary.components: 508+ total: 23 custom blocks, 115+ UI block variants, 39 UI primitive families, 15 top-level, 8 portal (React)
findings_summary.queries: 15+ GROQ queries (all defineQuery), 4 block resolvers, module-level caching
findings_summary.tests: 94 test files: 58 unit/component, 14 E2E (×5 browsers), 22 integration
findings_summary.infrastructure: 6 GitHub Actions, 5 Docker services, D1+KV+DO bindings, rate limiter worker
findings_summary.deployment: Cloudflare Pages (static + SSR Worker), Sanity hosted Studio, GitHub Pages (Storybook)
findings_summary.auth: Better Auth: Google OAuth, GitHub OAuth, Magic Link (Resend), D1 sessions, KV cache, sponsor whitelist escalation
key_recommendations: Consider astro:env for type-safe env vars
Add MPA View Transitions for polish
Clean up orphan post document in Content Lake
Add pre-commit hooks / lint CI enforcement
Add E2E tests for student portal

completed_steps.summary: Parallel deep scan: astro-app, studio, infrastructure
Parallel doc generation: 6 agents wrote 8 documents
Master index generated with all links

resume_instructions: Workflow completed successfully. All documentation generated and indexed.
